query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `waSessions` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `accountId` int NOT NULL,
  `sessionKey` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `sessionData` mediumtext NOT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `waSessions_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
  CONSTRAINT `waSessions_account_key_unique` UNIQUE(`accountId`, `sessionKey`)
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user rskERJxqepVxgiV.root --database fNE9efXdCmnppeWra27xJs --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `waSessions` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `accountId` int NOT NULL,
  `sessionKey` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `sessionData` mediumtext NOT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `waSessions_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
  CONSTRAINT `waSessions_account_key_unique` UNIQUE(`accountId`, `sessionKey`)
);
